prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small red metal cylinder
  - obj_1: small red metal sphere
  - obj_2: large cyan rubber cube
  - obj_3: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_4: small gray metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large purple metal cylinder
  - obj_6: large red metal cube
  - obj_7: large yellow rubber sphere
  - obj_8: large green metal cube

Questions:
[qrr_0281] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0282] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0283] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0284] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0285] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0286] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0287] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0288] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0289] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0290] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0291] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0292] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0293] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0294] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0295] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0296] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0297] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0298] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0299] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0300] Compare the distance between obj_2 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
